name: Claude Agent (contained auto mode)
description: Installs Claude Code, Pi, and oh-my-pi (omp) - all usable against the same Anthropic account or a local model - plus an egress-allowlist firewall and a `vibe` wrapper for opt-in unattended auto mode (`vibe` runs omp --yolo, `vibe claude` runs claude --dangerously-skip-permissions). Plain `pi` has no built-in auto mode, so it's supervised-only. Consuming devcontainer.json must set runArgs: ["--cap-add=NET_ADMIN", "--cap-add=NET_RAW"] and postStartCommand: "sudo /usr/local/bin/init-firewall.sh".
